response_text:
Having tool issues — exec, read, subagents aren't working. Can you check if the file exists and share what's in it?

Look for: `~/.openclaw/workspace/agent-shadow/src/session_hooks.py`

Or run: `find ~/.openclaw -name "*hook*" -o -name "*session*" 2>/dev/null | head -20`

I want to see what the current hook is doing so we can fix it to parse the .jsonl files instead of gateway.log.
